item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Nudevember: Satsuki Kiryuin
item.description:
Models: Celestite cosplay & Kitkatcos Continuining with Nudevember Nudist Beach Kill la Kill cosplay, here's some Satsuki Kiryuin cosplays. With a few more Nonon's because there are so many. Some I can't post here.
For reference Satsuki's actually a really interesting character. I hope these aren't too much. I admit the outfit is a bit revealing, but past Nudevember posts were okay, and it's an impressive cosplay that takes a lot of guts to wear in public.
Model: Kamisamalisa
Model: Bunni Black
Model: Hikari no Kurai
Models: Jeancosplay & Danisaurz
item.dc:creator: MermaidNinja

item.title: F-4E 2020 Terminator celebrated its 50th anniversary with a special valley pass!
item.dc:creator: esberat

item.title: Need a reminder of your fleeting existence today?
item.description:
I’m warning you, this dump hurt my feelings
Deeply acknowledging the finality of eras passed has been something I have really felt lately
And this dump really hones that
So I’m warning you
The fleeting nature of existence is what makes it feel so special, so beautiful, yet the constant dull ache of yearning for what has passed and will never be again really puts a continual knot in one’s stomach
item.dc:creator: Montanaebananae

item.title: She hugged her kitten with her paws like it was the sweetest thing! Those cats are so adorable.

zero thoughts
